because.text: Verdict accepted: hash-leaf model, genesis intrinsic, ADR-002 all confirmed with zero P0/P1; adversarial S-chain attack correctly fails (delta=0 < cost=2). One substantive correction on top: DeepSeek's recommended rounding pin (half away from zero) contradicts the ADR's own worked-example formula on negative ties (avg(-1,-2): -1 vs -2) - pinned floor-division formula instead, with a mandatory negative-tie wave vector. Review quota met (3 families); v0.5 proceeds to the implementation gate.

subject.note: DeepSeek v4 Pro ADR gate review (3 of 3) - all candidates CONFIRMED
